title: PlayerTrack
description: A mod notifying you of the presence of a player specified in the configs next to you.
body:
A mod notifying you of the presence of a player specified in the configs next to you.
![Screen of configs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4bb94698b70de2c994191595011175d8fc1b34a8.png)
![How the mod works approximately](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2d16e3f74963d915ce2d747bf78546a1567c82b2.png)
